rows.label: qev011702_MSG0002
rows.name: Huh?! Um...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0003
rows.name: Ah! Oh right! It's you, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0004
rows.name: What are you doing in a place like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0005
rows.name: Me? I'm, well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0006
rows.name: I'm continuing my investigation![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0007
rows.name: Eh...? I was captured...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0008
rows.name:
What are you talking about, Senpai? I'm
completely free to move around, and I'm
standing right here in the flesh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0009
rows.name:
Did you maybe fall for some
kind of elaborate trap?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_JNK0010
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev011702_SEL0011
rows.name: Try asking some questions.

rows.label: qev011702_JNK0020
rows.name: Trust

rows.label: qev011702_SEL0021
rows.name: Listen to her story.

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0010
rows.name:
Eh...? Why did I come all the
way out here to begin with?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0011
rows.name: That's a sudden question~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0012
rows.name: The reason I came here is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0013
rows.name:
For the money, of course! I want to be
a BLADE, so that's obvious, right?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0014
rows.name:
I mean, it's not like I have that
strong of a curiosity or anything...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm shy, and the only thing I
can trust is money, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0016
rows.name:
That's why I set my sights on
this continent, since I heard
there was a lot of treasure here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0017
rows.name:
Well, I ended up getting captured
anyway, so I'm totally useless~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0018
rows.name: I'll reflect on my actions~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0021
rows.name:
I know, right~ There are a lot
of insidious traps around here,
so you have to be careful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0022
rows.name:
But that's not something I
should be telling you, Senpai.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0023
rows.name: I still have so much to learn from you,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0024
rows.name:
and Walter-kyoukan has practically
given up on me already...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0025
rows.name:
I mean, honestly, that old man!
He's kind of annoying, isn't he?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0026
rows.name: Totally different from you, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0027
rows.name:
He's always forcing all these
stiff, formal rules on me, and he
smells weird when he gets close![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0028
rows.name: I definitely prefer you, Senpai...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Wait, huh? What's wrong?
Why the sudden serious face?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0030
rows.name: Did I say something out of character...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_JNK0030
rows.name: Combat

rows.label: qev011702_SEL0031
rows.name: Prepare for battle.

rows.label: qev011702_JNK0040
rows.name: Trust

rows.label: qev011702_SEL0041
rows.name: Remain confident that it's the real one.

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0031
rows.name: W-W-W-What are you doing~?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0032
rows.name:
Drawing your weapon like you're
totally ready to fight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0033
rows.name:
Senpai, it's me! Your cute junior!
Why won't you lower your weapon~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0034
rows.name:
You're being unreasonable~!
This is so frustrating~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0035
rows.name:
.........Actually, to be
blunt, you're annoying![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0037
rows.name:
Oh, thank goodness! Just as expected
of you, Senpai! You'll trust anything
your junior says, won't you~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0038
rows.name:
Too easy! Too naive! Are you not
afraid of dying, you idiot?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0039
rows.name:
.........Ah, that tone just now
wasn't very much like me... was it?
Ah, ahahahaha..................[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011702_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Tch! The personality
trace wasn't complete yet![ST:wait ]
